user.title: GyverHub Setup
user.description: Configure the GyverHub integration. Make sure MQTT is configured first.

data_description.prefix: The MQTT prefix used by your GyverHub devices (e.g., MyDevices)
data_description.update_interval: How often to refresh device data (0.1 to 10 seconds, default 0.5)

error.cannot_connect: MQTT integration is not configured. Please set up MQTT first.
error.invalid_prefix: Invalid prefix. Please enter a valid prefix.
